medications.name: Metformin
medications.description: Gradually reduces glucose absorption. Effect builds over 2 hours.

medications.name: SGLT2 Inhibitor
medications.description: Burns glucose in a 2-row skip pattern, floor at 200 mg/dL

medications.name: GLP-1 Agonist
medications.description: Slower absorption, +4 WP, burns glucose in a 2-row skip pattern
